name: SiamEast Solutions Public Company Limited
summary: SiamEast Solutions Public Company Limited distributes industrial equipment in Thailand. The company offers centrifugal pumps for utility systems and industrial production processes; positive displacement pumps for high viscosity fluids; liquid ring gas and centrifugal gas compressors; and energy efficiency measurement of pump systems, as well as engineering services for pumps. It also provides production process equipment, including strainers, filters, decanter centrifuges, mist eliminators, desiccants, ceramic catalyst bed support products, equipment to exchange materials, thermal and combustion units, air pollution treatment units, plastic pipes, plastic lined galvanized steel pipes, fire hoses, plastic tanks, breather valves, pressure relief valves, pressure relief plates, flameless explosion venting devices, isolation valves, and explosion suppression. In addition, the company offers adhesive products comprising cyanoacrylate glues, anaerobic adhesives, thread sealings, retainings, liquid gaskets, gasket sheet and spiral wound gaskets, and epoxy glues; sealant materials consisting of silicone and acrylic sealants, and polyurethane grouts; coating materials, such as coating and rust treatment products; and occupational health and safety products, including industrial cleaning paper products, machine tool removers, hand cleansers, gasket removers, safety glasses, safety gloves, body protection suits, fire blankets, chemical protection guards, heat resistant glass products, insulation products, pipe repairing kits, and cutting and grinding discs. Further, it provides surface coating services for machinery and equipment; design and sewing services for insulating covering machinery and equipment; demolition, assembly, installation, and testing services; and other services for the installation of a new pump. The company was founded in 1993 and is headquartered in Rayong, Thailand.
